projects.title: WiFi-Controlled RC Car Upgrade
projects.description: Upgrading RC car to WiFi-based IoT control system
projects.summary: Extending Bluetooth RC car to WiFi using ESP8266 and PlatformIO. Focused on network communication, structured firmware design, and scalable control logic for real-time IoT-based remote operation.

projects.title: Flutter Activity Logger
projects.description: Local-first mobile app for tracking daily work
projects.summary: Designed a lightweight mobile app for logging daily activities, issues, and solutions. Focused on local-first architecture for reliability and fast access without dependency on internet connectivity.

projects.title: Bluetooth RC Car Controller (Flutter App)
projects.description: Flutter app for Bluetooth-based RC car control
projects.summary: Built a mobile application using Flutter to control the RC car via Bluetooth. Implemented real-time command transmission, UI controls for movement, and seamless communication with Arduino using UART over HC-05 module.

projects.title: Mode-Switching Bluetooth RC Car
projects.description: Multi-mode RC car with Bluetooth and sensors
projects.summary: Developed a modular embedded system with manual, obstacle avoidance, and line-following modes. Integrated sensors, motor drivers, and real-time control using Arduino and Flutter-based mobile interface.

projects.title: Small IoT and Embedded Experiments
projects.description: Mini projects exploring sensors and embedded systems
projects.summary: Built small experiments around sensor interfacing, GPIO control, and LED automation. Focused on debugging, circuit design, and strengthening embedded fundamentals through isolated, practical builds.

projects.title: Real-Time Chat Application
projects.summary: Built a real-time chat system to explore event-driven architecture and multi-user communication. Focused on synchronization, responsiveness, and efficient handling of real-time data.

projects.title: TypeFromImage
projects.description: Typing app using image-based text with audio
projects.summary: Built a typing practice app using image text input and added audio feedback for engagement. Focused on improving UX and interaction through browser-based real-time input handling.

projects.title: Habiqua Room Rental Ecosystem
projects.description: Designed SaaS system for room rental operations
projects.summary: Designed a SaaS platform covering property listing, booking, and pricing logic. Focused on user roles, workflows, and scalable architecture for handling multi-property rental operations.

projects.title: S3 Library Platform
projects.description: Built SaaS system for library operations management
projects.summary: Developed a multi-tenant SaaS platform for subscriptions, seat allocation, and admin workflows. Project was put on hold due to adoption challenges, providing insights into product-market fit.

projects.title: Flask Authentication System
projects.summary: Implemented login and logout functionality using Flask with session handling and database integration. Strengthened understanding of backend request handling and authentication flows.

projects.title: Expense Tracker Web App
projects.description: Web app for tracking expenses and reports
projects.summary: Built an expense tracking system with CRUD operations and MySQL database. Implemented reporting features to help users manage budgets and analyze spending patterns.

projects.title: Sudoku Solver
projects.description: Backtracking algorithm to solve Sudoku puzzles
projects.summary: Implemented a recursive backtracking algorithm to solve Sudoku efficiently. Focused on constraint validation and optimizing search paths for better performance.

projects.title: N-Queens Solver
projects.summary: Developed a recursive solution enforcing row, column, and diagonal constraints. Strengthened understanding of recursion, optimization, and algorithm design techniques.

projects.title: Rat in a Maze Solver
projects.summary: Built a pathfinding algorithm using recursion and constraint checking. Improved logical thinking, boundary validation, and optimization techniques in algorithm design.

projects.title: Mars Mission Graphics Program
projects.summary: Created a graphical simulation using C to visualize motion and trajectory. Helped understand animation basics, rendering logic, and fundamentals of computer graphics.
